description: Retrieve messages from a conversation with type filtering (consolidates getMessages + getCommits)

main.description: Retrieve messages from an MLS conversation. Messages are GUARANTEED to be returned in conversation timeline order (seq ASC). Clients MUST use seq for display/pagination/read cursors and use epoch only as the MLS decryptability gate. The 'type' filter replaces the separate getCommits endpoint.

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to return

sinceSeq.description: Fetch messages with seq > sinceSeq (pagination cursor)

type.description: Filter by message type: 'app' for user content only, 'commit' for MLS protocol control messages only, 'all' for both

fromEpoch.description: Lower bound (inclusive) on MLS epoch. Only honored for type='commit' or type='all' — narrows the commit-catchup range so LIMIT reaches the commits a lagging client actually needs. Defaults to 0 (start of history) when omitted.

toEpoch.description: Upper bound (inclusive) on MLS epoch. Only honored for type='commit' or type='all'. Defaults to the conversation's current_epoch when omitted.

joinEpoch.description: Recipient's join epoch for this convo. Server MUST suppress application messages with epoch < joinEpoch in the response. Commits are NOT suppressed (recipients need them for tree state). Optional; when omitted, server falls back to per-recipient join-epoch lookup.

messages.description: Messages in stable conversation timeline order (seq ASC)

lastSeq.description: Sequence number of the last message in this response. Use as sinceSeq for next page.

gapInfo.description: Gap detection metadata for missing messages

suppressedBeforeJoin.description: Count of pre-join messages suppressed from this response.

errors.name: NotMember
errors.description: Caller is not a member of the conversation

errors.name: InvalidCursor
errors.description: sinceSeq parameter is invalid or exceeds available messages

hasGaps.description: Whether there are gaps in the sequence number range

totalMessages.description: Total number of messages in the conversation
